## What does this change?

<!-- A short summary of the change and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Notebooks are committed with **outputs cleared** (Kernel → Restart & Clear Output)
- [ ] No API keys, real endpoints, or proprietary names added
- [ ] If I changed a core notebook, I mirrored it into its `_with_ui` twin (and vice-versa)
- [ ] If I changed the provider/config block, I applied it across all relevant notebooks
- [ ] New tools (if any) are read-only / sandboxed, or gated behind a confirmation
- [ ] I ran the affected notebook(s) end-to-end against a configured provider
